cards.title: Mona Lisa / Louvre version
cards.creator: Leonardo da Vinci

cards.title: Isleworth Mona Lisa
cards.creator: Unknown / disputed Leonardo attribution

cards.title: Bedroom in Arles
cards.creator: Vincent van Gogh
cards.notice: Bedroom in Arles shows Van Gogh returning to the same room as an image to test color, space, and emotional tone.
